heading: Public entity operating a demand responsive system
label: 12144 Public entity operating a demand responsive system
text: If a public entity operates a demand responsive system, it shall be considered discrimination, for purposes of and , for such entity to purchase or lease a new vehicle for use on such system, for which a solicitation is made after the 30th day following , that is not readily accessible to and usable by individuals with disabilities, including individuals who use wheelchairs, unless such system, when viewed in its entirety, provides a level of service to such individuals equivalent to the level of service such system provides to individuals without disabilities.section 12132 of this titlesection 794 of title 29July 26, 1990
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .July 26, 1990section 231(b) of Pub. L. 101–336section 12141 of this title
